title: LocalDef Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function LocalDef (LocalNumber As Integer) As Boolean
parameters: LocalNumber	Integer expression (1-15) representing which local coordinate to return status for.
description: Returns if a Local is defined.
see_also:
Local, LocalClr

LocalDef Example

VB Example:

Dim localExists As Boolean

localExists = m_spel.LocalDef(1)

C# Example:

bool localExists;

localExists = m_spel.LocalDef(1);
examples:
Dim localExists As Boolean
localExists = m_spel.LocalDef(1)
